meta.title: MD Builders - Ditshebeletso tsa Kaho tse Tshwanelang Gauteng
meta.description: Ditshebeletso tsa kaho, ho roala, ho penta, ho beha majwe, ho beha lithaele, le metsi Gauteng kaofela.
meta.keywords: kaho, ditshebeletso tsa kaho, ho roala, ho penta, ho beha majwe, ho beha lithaele, Gauteng, Johannesburg, Pretoria

services.title: Ditshebeletso tsa Rona
services.description: Re fana ka ditshebeletso tse felletseng tsa kaho le tlhokomelo Gauteng kaofela

building.name: Kaho

paving.description: Ditsela tsa dikoloi, ditsela tsa ho tsamaea, le ho beha majwe kantle

tiling.name: Ho Beha Lithaele
tiling.description: Lithaele tsa fatše le marako bakeng sa libaka tsohle

plumbing.name: Ditshebeletso tsa Metsi
plumbing.description: Ho kenya, ho lokisa, le tlhokomelo

brickwork.name: Mosebetsi wa Litene
brickwork.description: Ditshebeletso tsa setsebi tsa ho beha litene le mosebetsi wa ho aha marako le meaho

concrete.name: Mosebetsi wa Konkreite
concrete.description: Motheo, li-slab, ditsela tsa dikoloi, le meaho ea konkreite e matlafalitsoeng

electrical.name: Motlakase
electrical.description: Ho kenya motlakase, ho lokisa, le ho latela polokeho

extensions.name: Ho Atolosa
extensions.description: Ho atolosa matlo le meaho ea khoebo

fencing.name: Terata
fencing.description: Terata ea tšireletso, marako a meeli, le ho kenya masango

flooring.name: Fatše
flooring.description: Ho kenya fatše, ho lokisa, le ditshebeletso tsa ho nchafatsa

installation.name: Ho Kenya
installation.description: Ditshebeletso tsa setsebi tsa ho kenya mekhoa e fapaneng le lisebelisoa

landscaping.name: Ho Hlophisa Serapa
landscaping.description: Moralo oa serapa, ho hlophisa serapa sa kantle, le ho lokisa mobu

maintenance.name: Tlhokomelo
maintenance.description: Ditshebeletso tsa tlhokomelo le ho boloka meaho kamehla

renovation.name: Ho Nchafatsa
renovation.description: Ho nchafatsa ka botlalo matlo le meaho ea khoebo

repairs.name: Ho Lokisa
repairs.description: Ditshebeletso tsa tšohanyetso le tse hlophisitsoeng tsa ho lokisa ditlhoko tsohle tsa kaho

roofing.name: Marulelo
roofing.description: Ho kenya marulelo, ho lokisa, tlhokomelo, le ho thibela metsi

waterproofing.name: Ho Thibela Metsi
waterproofing.description: Ditharollo tsa ho thibela metsi tlas'a mobu, marulellong, le kantle

about.title: Ka MD Builders
about.subtitle: Molekane wa Hao ea Tshepehang oa Kaho Gauteng
about.heroTitle: Lilemo tse 15+ tsa Botle ba Kaho
about.heroSubtitle: Re aha tšepo, morero o le mong ka nako Gauteng Province kaofela

story.title: Pale ea Rona
story.content: E thehiloe ke Meshack Dlamini, MD Builders e sebeletse sechaba sa Gauteng lilemo tse fetang 15. Seo se qalileng e le khoebo e nyenyane ea kaho se holile sa ba e 'ngoe ea mabitso a tšepahalang ka ho fetisisa kahong ea matlo le ea khoebo Johannesburg, Pretoria, le libaka tse haufi.

mission.title: Sepheo sa Rona
mission.content: Ho fana ka ditshebeletso tsa kaho tse ikhethang tse fetang tse lebeletsoeng ke bareki ba rona ha re ntse re boloka maemo a phahameng a boleng, polokeho, le botshebi. Re lumela ho aha likamano tse tšoarellang ka puisano e hloekileng le mosebetsi o motle.

items.title: Boleng Pele
items.description: Ha re ke re etse kompromaise ka boleng. Morero o mong le o mong o fumana tlhokomelo ea rona e felletseng ea lintlha le boitlamo ba botle.

items.title: Ho Tšepahala
items.description: Bareki ba rona ba ka tšepa ho rona ho fana ka merero ka nako le ka har'a tekanyetso ea chelete, nako le nako.

items.title: Botšepehi
items.description: Litheko tse hloekileng, puisano e hlakileng, le mekhoa ea khoebo ea boitšoaro e tataisa tsohle tseo re li etsang.

items.title: Polokeho
items.description: Re boloka maemo a phahameng a polokeho ho sireletsa sehlopha sa rona, bareki, le thepa ea bona.

experience.title: Hobaneng o Khethe MD Builders?
items: Ho feta lilemo tse 15 tsa boiphihlelo ba kaho
E na le laesense e felletseng 'me e sireletsehile
Re sebeletsa libaka tsohle Gauteng kaofela
Litheko tsa mahala, tse se nang boitlamo
Ditshebeletso tsa tšohanyetso tsa ho lokisa li fumaneha

services.title: Ditshebeletso tsa Rona tsa Kaho
services.subtitle: Ditharollo tse Felletseng tsa Kaho Gauteng Kaofela
services.heroSubtitle: Ho tloha ho lokiseng ha manyenyane ho ea ho merero e meholo ea kaho, re sebetsana le tsohle

steps.title: Puisano
steps.description: Re buisana ka ditlhoko tsa morero oa hao 'me re fane ka keletso ea setsebi

steps.title: Tekanyetso
steps.description: Litheko tse qaqileng, tse hlakileng ntle le litšenyehelo tse patiloeng

steps.title: Ho Rala
steps.description: Ho rala morero ka hloko le ho hlahisa nako ea ho sebetsa

steps.title: Ho Phethahatsa
steps.description: Kaho ea setsebi le lintlafatso tsa tsoelo-pele kamehla

steps.title: Ho Qeta
steps.description: Tlhahlobo ea ho qetela le ho fana ka tiiso ea boleng

cta.title: O Ikemiselitse ho Qala Morero oa Hao?
cta.subtitle: Fumana tekanyetso ea hao ea mahala kajeno

ourWork.title: Mosebetsi wa Rona
ourWork.subtitle: Portfolio ea Merero ea Kaho e Phethiloeng
ourWork.heroTitle: Sheba Mosebetsi wa Rona oa Boleng
ourWork.heroSubtitle: Sheba portfolio ea rona ea merero e atlehileng Gauteng kaofela
ourWork.noResults: Ha ho merero e fumanoeng e lumellanang le litekanyetso tsa hao

contact.title: Ikopanye le MD Builders

contact.heroTitle: Ha Re Aheng Ntho e Kholo Hammoho
contact.heroSubtitle: Ikopanye le rona kajeno bakeng sa puisano ea mahala le tekanyetso

form.title: Fumana Tekanyetso ea Hao ea Mahala
form.name: Lebitso le Felletseng
form.success: Molaetsa o rometsoe ka katleho! Re tla ikopanya le uena haufinyane.
form.error: Ho hloleha ho romela molaetsa. Ka kopo leka hape kapa o re letsetse ka kotloloho.

info.title: Tlhahisoleseling ea ho Ikopanya
info.hours:
Mos - Lab: 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Mok: 8:00 AM - 4:00 PM
Son: Mehala ea tšohanyetso feela
info.emergency: Ditshebeletso tsa Tšohanyetso tsa 24/7 li Fumaneha

serviceAreas.title: Libaka tsa Tshebeletso
serviceAreas.description: Re sebeletsa ka boikgantšo bareki ba matlo le ba khoebo Gauteng Province kaofela

faq.title: Dipotso tse Botsoa Hangata
faq.subtitle: Dipotso tse Tloaelehileng ka Ditshebeletso tsa Rona tsa Kaho
faq.heroTitle: O na le Dipotso? Re na le Dikarabo
faq.heroSubtitle: Fumana dikarabo tsa dipotso tse tloaelehileng ka ditshebeletso tsa rona

items.question: Na le fana ka litheko tsa mahala?
items.answer: E, re fana ka litheko tsa mahala, tse se nang boitlamo bakeng sa ditshebeletso tsohle tsa rona. Ikopanye le rona feela ka lintlha tsa morero oa hao 'me re tla hlophisa nako e loketseng ea ho hlahloba ditlhoko tsa hao.

items.question: Ke libaka life tseo le li sebeletsa?
items.answer: Re sebeletsa libaka tsohle Gauteng Province kaofela, ho kenyelletsa Johannesburg, Pretoria, East Rand, West Rand, le libaka tse haufi. Ikopanye le rona ho netefatsa phihlello ea sebaka sa hao se itseng.

items.question: Na le na le laesense 'me le sireletsehile?
items.answer: E, MD Builders e na le laesense e felletseng 'me e sireletsehile. Re jara inshorense e felletseng ea boikarabelo ho sireletsa bareki ba rona le sehlopha sa rona nakong ea merero eohle.

stillHaveQuestions.title: O sa na le Dipotso?
stillHaveQuestions.subtitle: Se ke oa tsilatsila ho fihlela - re teng ho thusa!

about.title: Ka Meshack Dlamini
about.description: Ka boiphihlelo ba lilemo tse fetang 15 indastering ea kaho, Meshack Dlamini o hahile lebitso la mosebetsi o motle le tshebeletso e tshepehang Gauteng kaofela.
about.experience: Ho tloha ho lokiseng matlo a manyenyane ho ea ho merero e meholo ea kaho, re fana ka liphetho tse ikhethang tse etsang hore nako e fete.

testimonials.title: Seo Bareki ba Rona ba se Buang
testimonials.subtitle: Se ke wa nka lentswe la rona feela

items.text: Meshack le sehlopha sa hae ba entse mosebetsi o motle haholo ho nchafatsa kichineng ea rona. Ba setsebi, ba tshepehang, 'me ba hlokomela lintlha.
items.name: Sarah Johnson

items.text: Mosebetsi o makatsang oa ho beha majwe tseleng ea rona ea koloi. O phethiloe ka nako 'me ka har'a tekanyetso ea chelete. Ho kgothaletswa haholo!
items.name: David Smith

items.text: Mosebetsi oa ho roala o ne o phethahetseng. O hloekile, oa setsebi, 'me boleng ba ho qeta bo fetile seo re neng re se lebella.
items.name: Maria Gonzalez

contact.address: Re Sebeletsa Libaka Tsohle tsa Gauteng

footer.mission: Ho fana ka ditshebeletso tsa kaho tsa boleng Gauteng kaofela ka botšepehi, botshebi, le tlhokomelo ea lintlha.
